config.script:
rowData=self.params.rowData
	system.perspective.print("rowData"+str(rowData))
	self.custom.AreaId=rowData['MST_Area_Id']
		
	
	MST_WorkStation_Ids=self.params.value
	system.perspective.print("MST_WorkStation_Ids rowData"+str(MST_WorkStation_Ids))
#	lists=[]
#	for i in MST_WorkStation_Ids:
#		if i !=",":
#			print i
#			lists.append(i)
	
	MST_WorkStation_Ids=MST_WorkStation_Ids.split(',')
	b=[]
	for i in range(len(MST_WorkStation_Ids)):
	    b.append(int(MST_WorkStation_Ids[i]))
	
			

		
	self.getChild("root").getChild("ddlPrevWorkStation").props.value=b
#	system.perspective.print("self.params.value"+str(self.params.value))
#	if self.params.value == -1 :
#		self.getChild("root").getChild("ddlPrevWorkStation").props.value=-1
#	else:
#		self.getChild("root").getChild("ddlPrevWorkStation").props.value=self.params.value

transforms.code:
pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(value)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {}
		dict["value"] = data['MST_WorkStation_Id']
		dict["label"] = data['WorkStationName']
		optionList.append(dict)
	return optionList

onChange.script:
try:
	
		scriptName = 'Location On Action Performed'
					
		SelctedRow=self.view.params.rowIndex
		columnName=self.view.params.column	
		rowData=self.view.params.rowData
		no=self.props.value
		system.perspective.print("SelctedRow "+str(SelctedRow))
		system.perspective.print("columnName "+str(columnName))
		system.perspective.print("no "+str(no))
		messageType = 'UpdateLocationRout'
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload = {"columnName":columnName,"No":str(no),"SelctedRow":SelctedRow}, scope = "page")
	
	
	except:
		import sys, os
		errorMessage=scriptName  +' Exception : '+  str(sys.exc_info()[1])
		system.perspective.print(errorMessage)
